main.hero_desc:
Experience a perfect Linux environment right in your browser without local setup.
Start instantly in your private sandbox for build, test, and deployment.
main.features_desc: We integrated all the tools developers need so you can focus only on coding and logic.
main.ft1_desc: Stop wasting time with Docker files or NVM configurations. Your isolated container workspace is created instantly with a single click.
main.ft2_desc: Perfectly control your remote workspace from your local machine via our Command Line Interface. Connect instantly with just a `tn ssh`.
main.ft3_desc: Your source code remains safe even if the session ends. Continue exactly where you left off when you reconnect.
main.ft4_desc: Don't struggle alone. Share your code instantly and exchange solutions with developers worldwide through our community.
main.cta_desc:
Thousands of developers are bringing their ideas to life with TerminalNexus.
Try it for free without registering a credit card.

user.title: My Page
user.withdraw_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This action cannot be undone.
user.withdraw_error: An error occurred during account deletion:

guide.title: User Guide
guide.step_1: 1. <1>Sign Up</1>: Create an account via the 'Sign Up' menu.
guide.step_2: 2. <1>Log In</1>: Log in with your account to use the service.
guide.step_3: 3. <1>Terminal Management</1>: Manage terminals from the dashboard after logging in.
guide.step_4: 4. <1>My Page</1>: Edit profile and delete account in My Page.
